## Observation

This lesson was captured during a test session and subsequently promoted.

## Why it matters

Without promotion, useful observations stay trapped in the inbox and never improve the methodology.

## How to apply

Review inbox lessons at session close and promote substantive ones into wiki entries or skill updates.
